# daytona_admin_user (Data Source)

Reads a Daytona user by ID using Daytona admin APIs.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_admin_user" "example" {
  user_id = "user-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user_id` (String) Daytona user ID to read.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) User creation timestamp.
- `email` (String) User email address.
- `id` (String) Daytona user ID.
- `name` (String) User display name.
- `public_keys` (Attributes List) User public SSH keys. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--public_keys))

<a id="nestedatt--public_keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `public_keys`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String) Public key value.
- `name` (String) Public key name.
